name: cloudbase-sites
description: CloudBase Sites lets Codex create, preview, save, deploy, inspect, and roll back Vite web apps hosted on Tencent CloudBase.

interface.shortDescription: Build, preview, version, and deploy sites to Tencent CloudBase.
interface.longDescription: Create Vite-based React or Vue web apps, preview them locally, save versions, deploy to CloudBase CloudApp independent domains, and add CloudBase database, storage, auth, functions, or CloudRun backend capabilities through cloudbase-mcp.
defaultPrompt: Build a CloudBase site and preview it locally.
Save this version, then deploy it to CloudBase.
Add database-backed state to this CloudBase site.
